home.hero_subtitle: Through interactive visualization, deeply understand Agent system engineering
home.core_pattern_desc: Every agent is a while loop + tool execution
home.message_flow_desc: How messages[] accumulates through the loop
home.learning_path_desc: 11 chapters to deeply understand Claude Code architecture

sessions.s01: Global View: CLI vs Agent OS

keyInsights.s01: Claude Code is not just a CLI, but an Agent Operating System
keyInsights.s02: Using while(true) + state instead of recursion to avoid stack overflow
keyInsights.s03: Tool calls need governance, model can't just call whatever it wants
keyInsights.s04: Separate the doer from the verifier
keyInsights.s05: Security layers should not bypass each other
keyInsights.s06: The key to ecosystem is making the model aware of its own capabilities
keyInsights.s07: Every Token has a cost, cache what can be cached, compress what can be compressed
keyInsights.s08: Productization is about handling day-two problems
keyInsights.s09: Keep the core simple, let extensions form an ecosystem
keyInsights.s10: State-driven rendering, separation of data and display
